title: Application of a Finite Automaton: Vending Machine Logic
description: A flowchart depicting how a simple vending machine can be modeled as a finite automaton, processing inputs (coins) to reach an accept state (dispensing an item).
relationships: Transitions between states are triggered by inputs: 'Insert Quarter' (25¢) or 'Insert Dollar' (100¢). The machine moves from Idle -> 0¢ -> 25¢ -> 50¢ (Accept). An invalid input (e.g., too much money) causes a transition to the Reject state, which returns coins and resets.
